decisions.description: MIS-5810 - excluded internal Account from automation MIS-5675
decisions.name: Relevant_for_Last_Activity_by_GTM
decisions.label: Relevant for Last Activity by GTM?

rules.name: Relevant_for_GTM
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2) AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND NOT(6) AND (NOT(7) AND (NOT(8) AND 9 AND 10)) AND 11 AND 12 AND 13 AND 14

rightValue.stringValue: SW Read Only (View all GTM Data)
SW Read Only (View all GTM Data)

rules.label: Relevant for GTM

decisions.name: Relevant_for_Last_Activity_by_MIR
decisions.label: Relevant for Last Activity by MIR?

rules.name: Relevant_for_MIR
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2) AND 3 AND (4 OR 5) AND NOT(6) AND 7 AND 8
rules.label: Relevant for MIR

rules.name: Yes_Relevant_for_LastActivityDate
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7)
rules.label: Yes, Relevant for LastActivityDate

decisions.description: MIS-5675 - Added ISNEW MIS-4429 PB to Flow migration
decisions.name: Rule_CPMC_CP_Meeting_Created_Lead
decisions.label: *Rule (CPMC)* - CP Meeting Created - Lead

rightValue.stringValue: Appcues Goal Reached - MI Hook Completion

decisions.name: Rule_RBIS_Relevant_for_BI_Intent_Score_Update
decisions.label: *Rule (RBIS)* - Relevant for BI Intent Score Update?

rules.name: RBIS_Lead_Relevant_for_Intent_Update
rules.label: RBIS - Lead Relevant for Intent Update

rules.name: RBIS_Contact_Relevant_for_Intent_Update
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR (3 AND NOT(4))) AND 5 AND 6
rules.label: RBIS - Contact Relevant for Intent Update

Flow.description: MIS-8419 - Updated conditions to identify CP events MIS-7947 - CP fields sync with Lead and Contact, Added Last CP Start Date MIS-7636 - Added LastActivityDate handling MIS-7201 MIS-6473 - Update First MQL Date on Handraise MIS-6396 - Update BI Intent Score MIS-6229 - Added Last Activity by MIR MIS-5810 - excluded internal Account from last actiivity by GTM automation MIS-5675 - Added Last Activity by GTM SubFlow MIS-5378 - Appcues Update MIS-4429 - PB to Flow migration
